request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force intelligence officer, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts national security at risk. The recent cyberattacks on our infrastructure prove we can't afford to wait. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-reliant—it's about being prepared. When our allies can't guarantee our security, we have to guarantee it ourselves. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
